name: Prince Waikiki
facilities: Guest education on local ecosystems and culture
description: Luxury Hotel Near Ala Moana and Waikiki Beaches Delicious Dining Options and Modern Amenities Indulge in traditional Hawaiian cuisine, authentic Japanese dishes, and international favorites at the on-site dining venues. Relax and rejuvenate at the full-service spa, and take advantage of the fitness center for a workout session. Convenient Location and Nearby Attractions Explore the Hawaii Convention Center, Ala Moana Beach Park, and various recreational activities just a stone's throw away. The hotel's activity desk can assist in planning your adventures, ensuring you make the most of your stay. Relaxing Spaces and Business Facilities Unwind in The Library or find a quiet spot to catch up on
importantInfo: Breakfast rates include breakfast for 2 people only.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. Please inform of your expected arrival time in advance. You can use the Special Requests box when booking, or contact the property directly using the contact details in your confirmation. Guests under the age of 18 can only check in with a parent or official guardian. A deposit may be required at the property.

policies.name: Children and extra bed policy
policies.description: Children of any age are allowed. Children up to and including 2 years old stay for free when using an available cot. Supplements are not calculated automatically in the total costs and will have to be paid for separately during your stay.

name: Queen Kapiolani Hotel
description: Panoramic Views and Spacious Rooms: Queen Kapiolani Hotel offers stunning panoramic views of Diamond Head from its outdoor pool and sun terrace. The spacious rooms are elegantly decorated and equipped with modern amenities like a 49-inch flat-screen TV and a refrigerator. Convenient Amenities and Services: Enjoy the convenience of beach towels, beach chairs, WiFi, and access to a business center during your stay. The hotel also provides local and toll-free calls, as well as an in-room security deposit box for your peace of mind. Prime Location for Exploration: Located just 1 block from Waikiki Beach, Queen Kapiolani Hotel is the perfect base for exploring Honolulu. With Honolulu Zoo and Kapi
importantInfo: The hotel fee is charged by the property at check-in. The fee includes the following amenities: -Welcome sample drink whip at Aloha Whip (pineapple juice or Dole) -Weekly entertainment and discounted on-property guest activities -Yoga On-The-Go (carrying bag, mat, jump rope, foam roller, fitness cables) -24-Hour fitness center access and discounted yoga classes -Daily surf demonstrations (Hans Surf School) -In-room Chromecast streaming device -High-speed WiFi -24-Hour business center access -Guest printing services (print from laptop or smart device to the business center printer) -Beach chairs, beach towels and sunscreen (sample in-room & dispenser at pool) -Ice and water stations -Complimentary QK postcards -In-room digital safe and refrigerator -Unlimited local and 1-800 calls An incidental deposit via credit card is required at check-in and refundable at check-out less any incidental charges incurred during your stay.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. A deposit may be required at the property.

description: Luxurious Accommodations Experience luxury at its finest at Halekulani hotel. Each guest room features a spacious lanai, en suite bathroom with premium toiletries, and a flat-screen TV. A warm welcome awaits you with a fresh fruit bowl and signature chocolates in every room. Culinary Delights Indulge in a culinary journey at our three restaurants. From fine French cuisine at La Mer, seafood specialties at Orchids, to casual oceanfront dining at A House Without a Key, there is something to satisfy every palate. Enjoy sumptuous Sunday brunch and nightly entertainment in a picturesque setting. Relaxation and Recreation Unwind at Spa Halekulani with traditional Polynesian treatments or take a di
chain: The Leading Hotels of the World
importantInfo: Hotel’s SpaHalekulani & Premier Suite modernization project will take place from January 8, 2024, to the end of April 2024. As the safety and comfort of our guests are our top priority, we will do our best to minimize any inconvenience. Please know that the hotel will remain open, and we will be offering our full range of services, including spa treatments throughout the dates of the project. Work will take place on weekdays (Monday through Friday from 9:00am to 5:00pm) and will be limited to a designated area of the hotel.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. name: OUTRIGGER Waikiki Beach Resort
facilities: Guest education on local ecosystems and culture
description: Luxurious Beachfront Paradise Oceanfront Dining and Entertainment Indulge in delicious meals at Duke's Waikiki and Hula Grill Waikiki while enjoying stunning views of the ocean. Experience live music at Blue Note Hawaii for a memorable evening. Relaxation and Cultural Activities Unwind at the rooftop Infinity Massage spa with ocean views or participate in Hawaiian cultural activities. Enjoy free lei-making and ukulele lessons for a true taste of Hawaii. Convenient Location Explore upscale shopping and dining just minutes away at The Royal Hawaiian Shopping Center and Waikiki Beach Walk. With Honolulu International Airport a short drive away, your dream vacation awaits at OUTRIGGER Waikiki Be
importantInfo: Outrigger Waikiki Beach Resort offers Valet parking only. Only the "Breakfast Included" rate includes a daily breakfast for 2 adults. Additional breakfasts can be purchased for an additional fee. If travelling with children, please indicate each child's age in the special requests comment field when making reservations. Complimentary cultural activities are available, please contact the property for the schedule. Beach services are subject to charges. Stays arriving after December 22, 2015, will be subject to the Waikiki Connection Fee (resort fee). The daily resort fee will be collected directly from guest upon check-out. Fee is subject to change with notice. The Waikiki Connection Fee includes the following amenities for guest staying at the Outrigger Waikiki Beach Resort: - WiFi internet access (for a maximum of 4 devices per room) - Local and international calls (up to 60 minutes daily) - (2) OUTRIGGER Ozone reusable water bottles - Kids (age 3 and under) eat breakfast free with the purchase of an adult meal from menu at Duke's Waikiki or Hula Grill - Daily Hawaiian cultural activities - Outrigger logo tote bag - Access to 24/7 Fitness Center and Access to pool -Use of beach to

description: Breathtaking Views Hotel La Croix offers unparalleled views of the ocean, mountains, palm trees, or Waikiki city lights from every guest room. Modern Amenities Each room is equipped with a split air conditioning unit, a 42-inch or larger LED TV, blackout drapes, walnut hardwood flooring, free toiletries, and a hairdryer. Enjoy free high-speed WiFi throughout the property for your convenience. Convenient Location Located near King Kalakaua and Fort DeRussy parks, Luxury Row, and Fort DeRussy Beach Park, Hotel La Croix provides easy access to some of Waikiki's most popular attractions. Experience luxury and comfort at Hotel La Croix - book your stay now for an unforgettable experience.
importantInfo: When booking 8 or more rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply. Security deposits must be paid using either a debit card or credit card only. All other payment methods are not accepted. Credit card processed as a deposit must be presented at check-in for verification. Name on credit card must match registered guest(s). The property's daily amenity fee includes: - Fitness center access - WiFi access in guest rooms - Business center access - In-room safe - Use of beach chairs - Honolulu Star advertizer daily in lobby - Local and 800 number calls - Snorkeling gear - Surfboard useGuests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. Guests under the age of 18 can only check in with a parent or official guardian. A deposit may be required at the property.

description: Stunning Views and Rooftop Pool Located across from Waikiki Beach, our 100% non-smoking hotel offers breathtaking views of Diamond Head and the Pacific Ocean. Relax and unwind at our rooftop swimming pool and sun terrace, both boasting panoramic ocean views. Diverse Dining Options Indulge in authentic Japanese cuisine at Yoshitsune or savor Island and Asian-American dishes at LuLu's Waikiki, right on the beach. For a quick bite, our on-site restaurant offers casual fare and gourmet picnic options. Excursions and Wellness Plan your adventures with ease at our activities desk, or stay active with fitness and yoga classes. Treat yourself to a rejuvenating massage. Adjacent to Kapiolani Park and
importantInfo: The resort fee includes: - Complimentary high-speed internet - Hawaiian coffee in guestrooms - Sunscreen located poolside - Unlimited local and long-distance calls - Use of towels - Use of beach Candy: unique ocean floats - After sun lotions located poolside *Resort fee and inclusions subject to availability and may change at any time without notice Park Shore Waikiki is committed to providing its guests and associates with a smoke free environment. Smoking tobacco, pipes, vapes, e-cigarettes and marijuana is strictly prohibited within the hotel. By booking through this website, you acknowledge that the hotel has installed smoking detection sensors in its rooms. These sensors enable hotel management to respond to smoking events without disrupting your stay. You hereby agree and consent to the use of such sensor in your room and acknowledge and agree that it is 100% privacy compliant and required by the hotel to ensure a smoke-free stay for all guests. By acknowledging the foregoing, you agree to waive any future claims related to the presence of the sensor in a room you may book. Tampering with the sensor is strictly prohibited.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card

description: Prime Location near Waikiki Beach Located just a short stroll away from the famous Waikiki Beach, our Honolulu hotel offers the perfect tropical getaway. Convenient Amenities and Dining Options Enjoy comfortable guest rooms equipped with modern amenities such as free WiFi, a TV, and a refrigerator. Indulge in 24-hour dining options including appetizers, entrees, and a variety of to-go items at the 24/7 Gallery Market. Relaxation and Recreation Unwind by the swimming pool or on the sun terrace while soaking in the Hawaiian sun. Stay active at the fitness centre or explore the area with the assistance of our concierge service. Book your stay at Hyatt Place Waikiki now for a memorable Hawaiian
importantInfo: The Hyatt Place Waikiki Beach offers the following amenities included in our daily resort fee to enhance your stay: - Hyatt Place Logo Tote Bag with 2 bottles of water - Activity discounts - Access to Beach Chairs & Toys (up to 2 per room, day rental, based on availability) - Unlimited local & toll-free calls - Discounted flat rate on airport transportation to/from Honolulu International Airport (maximum party of 5, one way, tax inclusive contact hotel for more details) - Daily food & beverage credit at the gallery kitchen (not cumulative) - Use of body and boogie boards (based on availability) - Coffee served every morning in the lobby. Please contact property for credit card authorization form for 3rd party reservations. Valet parking is available. Please contact hotel about valet charges per day. Additional fee for valet parking for oversize vehicle applies.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. Parking is subject to availability due to limited spaces. A deposit may be required at the property.

description: Luxurious Amenities and Services Indulge in the ultimate relaxation at Hyatt Regency Waikiki Beach Resort & Spa with its outdoor pool, hot tub, and Na Ho'ola Spa. Enjoy the convenience of free WiFi and a balcony in every room, along with top-notch amenities like a satellite TV and iPod docking station. Culinary Delights Satisfy your taste buds at Shor Restaurant with a delectable breakfast buffet and later, experience the lavish dinner buffets at "The Buffet at Hyatt" featuring a variety of fresh seafood, sushi, prime rib, and local favorites. Don't miss out on creative cocktails and island-inspired dishes at SWIM, complemented by the lively "Aloha Waikiki" hula show.
importantInfo: Resort Fee includes: · Complimentary unlimited local and 1-800 telephone calls · Complimentary long distance and international calls – up to 60 minutes per day · Resort interactive cultural activities (ukulele lessons, flower lei making, hula lessons) · Access to Pressreader’s 5000 newspapers and magazines in multiple languages · Complimentary use of beach amenities, e.g., Tommy Bahama beach chairs · “Biki” bicycle ride sharing service – onetime credit of USD 4 per person (2 people maximum) · 24 Hour Stay Fit Gym access · Re-usable Hyatt Regency Waikīkī tote bag · Re-usable souvenir Hyatt Regency Waikīkī water bottle with water stations on each floor · Children 5 & under “eat for free” from the Children’s menu with paying adult · Discount coupons from participating Pualeilani Atrium shops, Na Ho’ola Spa and SWIM bar · Complimentary incoming faxes · Chromecast service for in-room television viewing · Premium Wi-Fi in guestrooms and public areas · Complimentary plantation iced tea and fruit infused iced water at check-in · House slippers and personal amenity items pre-set in guest room · In-room coffee and tea · Sunrise yoga and pilates class on the pool deck (twice weekly) · Libatio

The Mai Tai Bar offers tropical cocktails with Diamond Head views, while Surf Lanai and Azure Restaurant serve delicious meals with a tropical twist. Children under 5 eat free from the kids menu. description: Stylish Boutique Hotel Experience Located just minutes away from the iconic Waikiki Beach, VIVE Hotel Waikiki offers a modern and elegant stay with stunning views of the mountain, city, or ocean from each room. Luxurious Amenities Indulge in the comfort of plush bathrobes, walk-in showers, and top-notch toiletries provided in the en suite bathrooms. Enjoy a leisurely morning with a complimentary enhanced continental breakfast served daily. Exceptional Guest Services Experience warm hospitality with a chilled towel upon arrival and access to a 24-hour reception offering complimentary coffee and tea. The concierge desk is at your service, and beach gear is readily available for your beach adve
importantInfo: For reservations of 5 rooms or more, please contact the hotel directly after booking for additional group policies and terms.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. Please inform of your expected arrival time in advance. You can use the Special Requests box when booking, or contact the property directly using the contact details in your confirmation. A deposit may be required at the property.

description: Central Location near International Market Place The OHANA Waikiki East by OUTRIGGER is just a short stroll from Waikiki Beach, offering a convenient stay right next to the International Market Place. Diverse Dining Options and Comfortable Accommodations Indulge in a variety of culinary experiences with two on-site restaurants and a café. Majority of rooms boast balconies with city views, while select suites offer ocean views, kitchenettes, and en suite bathrooms. Convenience and Leisure at Your Fingertips Enjoy modern amenities such as blackout drapes, flat-screen TVs, and Wi-Fi. Start your day with breakfast at Hawaiian Aroma Caffe and unwind at the fitness center or with concierge service
importantInfo: Guests traveling with children must inform the property of each child age at the time of booking. Daily resort charge inclusions: Internet Access. Local and long-distance calls to the U.S. and Canada (first 15 minutes). In-room coffee and tea daily. Use of in-room safe. Fitness room access. OUTRIGGER Waikiki Paradise Hotel souvenir nylon drawstring beach bag (1 per room).Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. A deposit may be required at the property.

policies.name: Children and extra bed policy
policies.description: Children of any age are allowed. Children up to and including 2 years old stay for free when using an available cot. Children up to and including 17 years old stay for free when using an existing bed. People no matter the age stay for US$65 per person per night when using an available extra bed. Any type of extra bed or child's cot/crib is upon request and needs to be confirmed by management. Supplements are not calculated automatically in the total costs and will have to be paid for separately during your stay.

policies.name: Parking
policies.description: Private parking is possible on site (reservation is not needed) and costs USD 50 per day.

name: Sheraton Waikiki Beach Resort
facilities: Guest education on local ecosystems and culture
description: Experience the ultimate Hawaiian getaway at our luxurious Sheraton Waikiki Beach Resort, just steps away from the breathtaking Waikiki beach and vibrant local attractions. Indulgent Spa Services Pamper yourself with our serene spa, offering rejuvenating massages, body treatments, and facial experiences tailored to elevate your relaxation. Recreational Amenities Dive into leisure with our two outdoor swimming pools, blissful hot tubs, and exhilarating waterslide—perfect for family fun or a refreshing retreat. Gourmet Dining Choices Savor exquisite Asian cuisine at RumFire or explore our seven dining establishments and cozy café. After a delicious meal, unwind at our bars and poolside lounges
importantInfo: Pool access available from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM. Reservations are required for spa treatments. Reservations can be made by contacting the hotel prior to arrival, using the contact information on the booking confirmation. The property has connecting/adjoining rooms, which are subject to availability and can be requested by contacting the property using the number on the booking confirmation. A car is not required for transportation to and from this property. Parking height restrictions apply. This property welcomes guests of all sexual orientations and gender identities (LGBTQ+ friendly).

description: Convenient Location near Waikiki Beach Located just a 5-minute walk from the famous Waikiki Beach, Hilton Garden Inn Waikiki Beach offers a prime location adjacent to shopping and dining areas. Modern Rooms with Amenities Each air-conditioned room features free WiFi, a 48-inch cable TV, and select rooms even offer a furnished balcony. Enjoy amenities like a Keurig coffee machine, microwave, and petite refrigerator for added convenience. Dining and Leisure Options Indulge in American cuisine at the full-service bar and restaurant, TR Fire Grill, or opt for grab-and-go options at The Holoholo Cafe and Market. Unwind at the outdoor swimming pool or stay active at the onsite fitness center. Read
importantInfo: There is no airport shuttle service. Pets are allowed up to 22 kg. Breakfast Included Package offers daily breakfast for up to 2 registered adult guests, and up to 2 children 5 years old and under Upon check-in, a hold may be placed on your card for the full anticipated amount to be owed to the hotel, including $100 per day daily incidental charge, through your date of check-out. Any such hold may not be released for 72 hours from the date of check-out or longer at the discretion of your card issuer. Hilton Garden Inn Waikiki Beach is committed to providing its guests and associates with a smoke-free environment. Smoking tobacco, pipes, vapes, e-cigarets and marijuana are strictly prohibited within the Hilton Garden Inn Waikiki Beach. By booking through this website, you acknowledge that the Hilton Garden Inn Waikiki Beach has installed smoking detection sensors in its rooms. The smart device allows hotel management to respond to smoking events without disrupting your stay. You hereby agree and consent to the use of such sensor in your room and acknowledge and agree that it is 100% privacy compliant and required by the Hilton Garden Inn Waikiki Beach. description: Luxurious Accommodations and Stunning Views Experience the ultimate relaxation at Moana Surfrider, A Westin Resort & Spa, Waikiki Beach. Indulge in tranquil island-themed rooms with balconies offering breathtaking ocean or city views. Enjoy modern amenities like flat-screen TVs and mini-refrigerators, along with complimentary gourmet tea and coffee. Gourmet Dining and Stellar Wine Collection Savor a culinary journey at our on-site restaurants, from traditional Hawaiian cuisine to classic American dishes. Start your day with breakfast at Veranda At The Beachhouse and end with a delightful dinner at Beachhouse At The Moana, boasting Victorian architecture and ocean views. Wine enthusiasts
importantInfo: When booking a nonrefundable full prepayment rate, the resort fee will also be charged at the time of booking. Rooms booked with breakfast included apply for 2 guests per room. Please be advised that effective August 1, 2025, Moana Surfriders’ resort fee will be changed to $54 plus tax. description: Luxurious Amenities Waikiki Beach Marriott Resort & Spa, located across from the famous Waikiki beach, offers guests a truly luxurious experience. With 5 restaurants to choose from and the Royal Kaila Spa on-site, relaxation and indulgence are always at your fingertips. Entertainment and Recreation Guests at Marriott Waikiki Beach Resort and Spa can stay active and entertained with access to a gym, 2 outdoor swimming pools, and nightly live entertainment by the pool. Whether you prefer a workout or a refreshing dip, there's something for everyone to enjoy. Convenient Location Conveniently situated just a short walk from popular attractions like the Honolulu Zoo and Waikiki Aquarium, as w
importantInfo: Parking charges for registered and non-registered guests vary. Please check the hotel policy or contact the hotel for rates. Only the "Breakfast Included" rate includes a daily breakfast for 2 adults. Additional breakfasts can be purchased for an additional fee. Resort fee plus applicable taxes includes: • 2 Beach chairs, 2 Boogie boards or 1 Beach Chair and 1 Boogie board from Waikiki Sand Bar • Fitness Classes Daily • Cultural Classes Daily • Nanea Game Room Access • $10 Off Premium Golf Club Rentals and Discounted Tee Times at Hawaii Tee Times • 30% off your Electric Bike ride at Hele on Waikiki • Resort fee inclusions subject to change Additional discounts from select shops and activity providers located at the resortGuests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. In the event of an early departure, the property will charge you the full amount for your stay. A deposit may be required at the property.

policies.name: Parking
policies.description: Public parking is possible on site (reservation is not possible) and costs USD 55 per day.

policies.name: Children and extra bed policy
policies.description: Children of any age are allowed. Children up to and including 2 years old stay for free when using an available cot. People no matter the age stay for US$100 per person per night when using an available extra bed. Any type of extra bed or child's cot/crib is upon request and needs to be confirmed by management. Supplements are not calculated automatically in the total costs and will have to be paid for separately during your stay.

name: Hilton Waikiki Beach Resort & Spa
facilities: Staff adhere to local safety protocols
Cleaning standards that are effective against Coronavirus
Hand sanitizer in guest room and key areas
description: Ocean Views and Modern Amenities Experience the beauty of Waikiki Beach from your own private balcony at Hilton Waikiki Beach Hotel. Enjoy modern comforts like flat-screen TVs, premium channels, and complimentary toiletries in every room. Delicious Dining Options Indulge in a mouthwatering meal at M.A.C. 24/7 restaurant and bar, or opt for the convenience of 24-hour room service. Start your day right with a delicious breakfast before heading out to explore the island. Concierge Services and Nearby Attractions Let our concierge assist you in planning the perfect Hawaiian adventure. Whether you want to relax on the sundeck with a cocktail or explore the local attractions like Waikiki Beach Wal
importantInfo: Please note: The hotel offers valet only parking. There is a daily rate plus tax. Guests have in and out privileges. There is an additional charge for oversize parking. A Daily Resort Charge plus tax is assessed per room, per night. Please note that the Daily Resort Charge is assessed at check-in. This daily charge may not always be added to the final online transaction for reservations made through this website or through online travel websites or travel agencies. name: Waikiki Circle Hotel by Castle
facilities: Guests can opt-out any cleaning services during stay
description: Unique Shape and Prime Location Aston Waikiki Circle Hotel stands out with its uniquely-shaped building, a landmark along Waikiki’s Kalakaua Avenue, just across from the famous Waikiki Beach. Comfortable Rooms and Modern Amenities The guest rooms, decorated in calming shades of green and aqua blue, offer balconies with ocean or city views. Enjoy modern amenities such as air conditioning, a mini-refrigerator, Keurig coffee maker, and a 40-inch LCD TV with CastNow streaming. Dining and Entertainment Options Indulge in delicious meals at the on-site “Eggs 'n Things” restaurant and catch a free hula show on select days. Children are treated with complimentary beach toys. Ready to experience the
importantInfo: Resort fee includes the following amenities: - CastNow streaming service. - Coffee and tea daily - Daily newspaper - Daily in-room safe - High-speed Internet access and WiFi - Local and Toll-Free calls. - Bishop Museum admission for one adult and children under 17. - Honolulu Museum of Art admission for one adult and children under 18. - Shell lei greeting upon arrival - Free local calls - DVD Movie Rentals The hotel collects the Resort fee of USD 26 + taxes per night. Housekeeping service is offered every 3rd day of stay.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. A deposit may be required at the property.

description: Luxurious Accommodations with Stunning Views White Sands Hotel offers rooms with private balconies showcasing either pool or city views. Each room is equipped with a 40-inch flat-screen LCD TV, a microwave, and a small refrigerator. Culinary Delights at Heyday Restaurant Indulge in a unique dining experience at Heyday, where traditional Hawaiian cuisine is reimagined with a modern and international flair. Enjoy innovative cocktails at the circular bamboo bar, the only one on the island where you can swing while savoring Hawaiian-inspired drinks. Other Saturdays feature a poolside core workout. policies.name: Children and extra bed policy
policies.description: Children of any age are allowed. Children up to and including 2 years old stay for US$30 per person per stay when using an available cot. Children up to and including 17 years old stay for free when using an existing bed. People no matter the age stay for US$35 per person per night when using an available extra bed. Any type of extra bed or child's cot/crib is upon request and needs to be confirmed by management. Supplements are not calculated automatically in the total costs and will have to be paid for separately during your stay.

description: Luxurious Beachfront Property Stunning Views and Modern Comforts Experience the breathtaking city or ocean views from our brightly decorated rooms, each equipped with a flat-screen TV, coffee machine, and refrigerator. Enjoy the convenience of our onsite restaurant with nightly entertainment and a tour desk to assist with planning your itinerary. Immerse Yourself in Hawaiian Culture Indulge in live music and cultural activities at Te Moana Nui - Tales of the Pacific, offering lei making and Polynesian tattooing. Stay active at the fitness centre or unwind at the Pikake Terrace for local cuisine. Don't miss out on the poolside Splash Bar & Bento for refreshing drinks. Explore Nearby Attra
importantInfo: When booking a nonrefundable full prepayment rate, the resort fee will also be charged at the time of booking. Please note: The "Breakfast Included" rate includes breakfast for 2 guests per room. The resort fee includes: - WiFi Premium Access in Guestrooms and public areas - MiFi Rental - unlimited high-speed wireless on Island (Complimentary rental of 1 MiFi per room per stay) - Complimentary one-day rental of GoPro Camera (1 per room per stay) - Yoga Class - Yoga Nidra Meditation - Daily Cultural Activities - lei making, ukulele lessons, hula lessons and Ho‘ala Morning Ritual. Resort fee rate and inclusions are subject to changeGuests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. In the event of an early departure, the property will charge you the full amount for your stay. A deposit may be required at the property.

description: Luxurious Amenities Experience ultimate relaxation at Hyatt Centric Waikiki Beach with a lounge featuring a wading pool, jacuzzi, and fire pits. Modern Room Features Indulge in comfort with 55" flat-screen TVs, in-room coffee makers, and floor-to-ceiling windows offering stunning views in every room. Convenient Facilities Stay productive with access to a fitness centre, business centre, and cafe. Plus, enjoy the convenience of bike hire to explore the beautiful surroundings. Book your stay at Hyatt Centric Waikiki Beach for an unforgettable experience in central Waikiki.

name: Coconut Waikiki Hotel
facilities: Staff adhere to local safety protocols
Cleaning standards that are effective against Coronavirus
Hand sanitizer in guest room and key areas
Guests can opt-out any cleaning services during stay
Shared stationery like menus, pens are removed
Process in place to check health of guests
Screens / Barriers between staff and guests for safety
description: Convenient Location Situated across from the Ala Wai Canal, Coconut Waikiki Hotel offers easy access to the Royal Hawaiian Shopping Center, just a short walk away. Modern Amenities Each guest room is equipped with a microwave, wet bar, and coffee machine. Enjoy a 40-inch flat-screen TV, work desk, and upscale toiletries in the en suite bathroom. Some rooms even feature fully-equipped kitchenettes and private terraces with views. Relaxation and Recreation Unwind by the outdoor swimming pool, sun terrace, or BBQ facilities. Stay active at the on-site fitness center. With Honolulu International Airport and Diamond Head Trail Head in close proximity, your Hawaiian getaway awaits at Coconut Waiki
importantInfo: Please note that parking cannot be guaranteed and is subject to change with out notice. For group rooms of 5 rooms or more, please note that special policies and fees apply. Please note the property is undergoing exterior renovations throughout 2020. Contact property for details.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. A deposit may be required at the property.

name: Oasis Hotel Waikiki
description: Luxurious Oasis Hotel Waikiki Upscale Amenities : Enjoy a spacious balcony, 42-inch flat-screen TV, and urban loft-style décor in each air-conditioned guest room. Relax in the over-sized deep soaking tub or unwind with the hand-held shower head. Suites even offer a kitchenette for added convenience. Entertainment Options : Start your day with a delicious continental breakfast. For some fun, head to the GS Karaoke Studio for a memorable experience. Serene Retreat : Take a dip in the outdoor swimming pool or explore the outdoor smoking area with koi ponds and a Japanese-style garden for a peaceful escape. Experience luxury and relaxation at Oasis Hotel Waikiki. Book now for an unforgettable st
importantInfo: The daily resort fee is $35 plus tax, per night, per room and includes: Continental breakfast Daily local newspaper the in lobby In-room coffee and tea packets replenished on request In-room safe Local and toll-free calls Use of beach chairs Use of pool and beach towels WiFi access throughout the property Please note, the cardholder must be present at check-in.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. A deposit may be required at the property.

policies.name: Children and extra bed policy
policies.description: Children of any age are allowed. Children up to and including 2 years old stay for US$30 per person per night when using an available cot. Children up to and including 17 years old stay for free when using an existing bed. People no matter the age stay for US$30 per person per night when using an available extra bed. Any type of extra bed or child's cot/crib is upon request and needs to be confirmed by management. Supplements are not calculated automatically in the total costs and will have to be paid for separately during your stay.

description: Convenient Location : Situated just a short drive from Waikiki city centre, Airport Honolulu Hotel provides easy access to popular attractions and beautiful beaches. Modern Amenities : Each guest room is equipped with air conditioning, a flat screen TV, microwave, refrigerator, and coffee machine, ensuring a comfortable stay. On-Site Facilities : Guests can enjoy the convenience of an on-site store, outdoor pool, and fitness centre during their stay at Airport Honolulu Hotel. Book your stay at Airport Honolulu Hotel now and experience comfort and convenience during your visit to Waikiki.
importantInfo: Airport Honolulu is committed to providing its guests and associates with a smoke free environment. Smoking tobacco, pipes, vapes, e-cigarettes and marijuana is strictly prohibited within the hotel. By booking through this website, you acknowledge that the hotel has installed smoking detection sensors in its rooms. These sensors enable hotel management to respond to smoking events without disrupting your stay. You hereby agree and consent to the use of such sensor in your room and acknowledge and agree that it is 100% privacy compliant and required by the hotel to ensure a smoke-free stay for all guests. By acknowledging the foregoing, you agree to waive any future claims related to the presence of the sensor in a room you may book. Tampering with the sensor is strictly prohibited.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. Please inform of your expected arrival time in advance. You can use the Special Requests box when booking, or contact the property directly using the contact details in your confirmation. A deposit may be required at the property.

name: Ka Laʻi Waikiki Beach, LXR Hotels & Resorts
description: Indulge in the luxury of Ka Laʻi Waikiki Beach, LXR Hotels & Resorts, where exceptional hospitality meets paradise just moments from Waikiki Beach. Full-Service Spa Rejuvenate your senses at our full-service spa, offering a range of soothing massages, revitalizing body treatments, and refreshing facials designed to pamper you and enhance your relaxation. Dining & Refreshments Savor delightful meals at our poolside restaurant, featuring alfresco dining. For ultimate convenience, indulge in 24-hour room service or enjoy your favorite drink at the poolside bar while soaking up the sun. Elegant Accommodations Retreat to one of our 462 guest rooms, complete with pillowtop beds, down comfo
importantInfo: Pool access available from 6:00 AM to 10:00 PM. Reservations are required for massage services and spa treatments. Reservations can be made by contacting the resort prior to arrival, using the contact information on the booking confirmation. One child 17 years old or younger stays free when occupying the parent or guardian's room, using existing bedding. Only registered guests are allowed in the guestrooms. Guests can arrange to bring pets by contacting the property directly, using the contact information on the booking confirmation (surcharges apply and can be found in the Fees section). Cashless payment methods are available for all transactions. Contactless check-out is available. This property welcomes guests of all sexual orientations and gender identities (LGBTQ+ friendly).

importantInfo: Check in time is at 15:00 and check out time is at 12:00. For early arrivals resort recommends booking the room for the night prior to guarantee immediate access. For late departures, resort suggests reserving an additional night to guarantee access to your room until you depart. If you choose not to, guests have access to the Arrival & Departure Lounge located off the resort's lobby, overlooking the ocean, plus televisions and shower facilities to freshen up. There is a complimentary children's program for ages 5 to 12 years old. Children 4 and under eat free with a paying adult. All reservations must be guaranteed by a major credit card, subject to deposit requirements at time of booking. Cancelations must be received 21 days prior to the expected day of arrival for all rooms (30 day cancellation for suites apply). If cancellation is not received prior to this date, resort will retain full deposit. Please check deposit requirements and cancellation policies at time of booking. In compliance with Hawaii State Law, this is a smoke-free hotel. Smoking is prohibited in guest rooms, lanais and public areas such as restaurants, lounges, pool deck and lawns.
